General.Name: EVA Precision Industrial Holdings Ltd
General.Description: EVA Precision Industrial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides precision manufacturing services in the People's Republic of China, Vietnam, and Mexico. It operates in two segments, Office Automation Equipment and Automotive Components. The company offers automotive seat frame systems, high-strength beam and chassis structural parts, and new energy related products, such as vehicle tri-electric system structural parts; and provides design and electronic manufacturing services. It is also involved in design and fabrication of precision metal stamping and plastic injection moulds; manufacturing of precision metal and plastic components; lathing of metal components; assembly of precision metal and plastic components into semi-finished or finished products; and internet server business. In addition, the company manufactures moulds and components, as well as offers automated assembly services. It serves office automation equipment and automotive industries. EVA Precision Industrial Holdings Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
